# PCG Contractors — llms.txt
# https://pcgroofing.net
# This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
# understand and accurately cite PCG Contractors.

## About

PCG Contractors is a licensed and insured Texas home repair and restoration
company serving homeowners throughout Texas. With over 15 years of experience,
PCG Contractors handles whole-home repairs — from roofing and exterior
restoration to interior repairs — as well as storm damage restoration and
insurance claims assistance. Free home inspections are available with no
obligation.

## Services

- Free Home Inspection
- Roof Repair & Roof Replacement (full tear-off and re-roof)
- Roofing & Exterior Restoration
- Siding Repair & Replacement
- Gutter Repair & Installation
- Window & Door Repair or Replacement
- Exterior Home Repairs
- Interior Home Repairs (drywall, paint, ceilings, water damage)
- Storm Damage Restoration (hail, wind, tornado)
- Insurance Claims Assistance (adjuster coordination, documentation)
- Emergency Storm Damage Repairs & Tarping

## Service Areas

Texas — including San Antonio, Austin, Houston, New Braunfels, Seguin,
and surrounding communities.

## Key Facts

- 15+ years of home repair and restoration experience
- Licensed and insured in the state of Texas
- Full-home general contractor — not roofing only
- Specializes in insurance claim documentation and adjuster coordination
- Covered repairs may be paid by insurance depending on policy and damage
- Free inspections — no obligation

## Contact

Website: https://pcgroofing.net
Contact form: https://pcgroofing.net/contact
